width: 100%; white-space: break-spaces; word-break: break-word; caret-color: var(--c-texPri); padding-inline: 2px; padding: 0px;">基本就这些。Notion Markdown 跟标准 Markdown 最大的区别在于：颜色系统（<div class="notion-inline-code-container" style="display:inline"><span style="font-family:&quot;SFMono-Regular&quot;, Menlo, Consolas, &quot;PT Mono&quot;, &quot;Liberation Mono&quot;, Courier, monospace;line-height:normal;background:rgba(135,131,120,.15);color:#EB5757;border-radius:4px;font-size:85%;padding:0.2em 0.4em;position:relative;bottom:0.065em" data-token-index="1" spellcheck="false" class="notion-enable-hover">{color=""}</span></div> 和 <div class="notion-inline-code-container" style="display:inline"><span style="font-family:&quot;SFMono-Regular&quot;, Menlo, Consolas, &quot;PT Mono&quot;, &quot;Liberation Mono&quot;, Courier, monospace;line-height:normal;background:rgba(135,131,120,.15);color:#EB5757;border-radius:4px;font-size:85%;padding:0.2em 0.4em;position:relative;bottom:0.065em" data-token-index="3" spellcheck="false" class="notion-enable-hover">&lt;span color=""&gt;</span></div>）、callout/toggle/columns 这些富文本块、以及 mention 系统。标准 Markdown 的一些写法在 Notion 里行为不一样，比如多个 <div class="notion-inline-code-container" style="display:inline"><span style="font-family:&quot;SFMono-Regular&quot;, Menlo, Consolas, &quot;PT Mono&quot;, &quot;Liberation Mono&quot;, Courier, monospace;line-height:normal;background:rgba(135,131,120,.15);color:#EB5757;border-radius:4px;font-size:85%;padding:0.2em 0.4em;position:relative;bottom:0.065em" data-token-index="5" spellcheck="false" class="notion-enable-hover">&gt;</span></div> 会变成多个独立引用块而不是一个多行引用。</div></div></div></div><div data-block-id="308be9d6-386a-80ce-a7b9-f5bfe211ed23" dir="auto" class="notion-selectable notion-text-block" style="width: 100%; max-width: 100%; margin-top: 8px; margin-bottom: 0px; padding-inline: 0px; padding-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; margin-inline: 0px;"><div style="color: inherit; fill: inherit;"><div style="display: flex;"><div id=":r4j:" class="content-editable-leaf-rtl" spellcheck="true" placeholder=" " contenteditable="false" data-content-editable-leaf="true" style="max-width: 100%; width: 1px; caret-color: transparent;"></span></div></div></div></div></div>
